{{Infobox religious building
| name = Himechino Shrine
| native_name = 比売遅神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15

{{nihongo|'''Himechino Shrine'''|比売遅神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izumo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|gōshi|lt=gōshi|ja|合祀|qid=Q11412524|1=Co-Enshrinement}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}}
* {{ill|Q135100459|ltq=Q135100459|qid=Q135100459|1=Shikinai Subshrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Mitamino Shrine|lt=Mitamino Shrine|qid=Q135041000|1=Mitamino Shrine}}
* {{ill|Q11395853|ltq=Q11395853|qid=Q11395853|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izumo Province}}
** Series ordinal: 115
** P155: {{ill|Mitamino Shrine|lt=Mitamino Shrine|qid=Q135041000|1=Mitamino Shrine}}
